entries.title: Network Republic
entries.summary: Codified mutual recognition of citizen credentials, shared anti-fraud measures, and consular referral channels across a layered digital governance structure.

entries.title: Nordic Digital Alliance
entries.summary: Data-residency requirements, cross-border incident reporting, and standard API surface definitions for multilateral interoperability.

entries.title: Republic of Solstice Islands
entries.summary: Honorary consular officers, document authentication workflows, and citizen-support call routing aligned with the layered republic model.

entries.title: Digital Standards Consortium
entries.summary: Observer rights in standards proceedings with voting rights on technical amendments and governance-layer specifications.

entries.title: Micronation Fellowship
entries.summary: Recommends favorable treatment for AETHERIA passport holders with reciprocal arrangements across friendly networks.

entries.title: Open Government Partnership — Digital Track
entries.summary: Open-data commitments, participatory budgeting standards, and public accountability frameworks through layered external representation.

pillars.title: Statehood Criteria
pillars.summary: Montevideo criteria fulfillment with digital-native evidence packages.

pillars.title: Bilateral Engagement
pillars.summary: Targeted recognition campaigns with mutual interest mappings.

pillars.title: Multilateral Access
pillars.summary: Observer status and committee participation in relevant international bodies.
